note: SUGGESTED role tags for a step's produces.role — the light artifact label carried by the node it records. Recommendations only; invent your own freely.

items.hint: A diverge node mapping lived problems/pains (no solutions yet).
A converge node naming the clustered key problem(s).
A converge node: user + need + surprising insight; frames the next How-Might-We.
A diverge node exploring one solution candidate.
A converge node down-selecting tested candidates (ranking + shortlist).
A converge node: winning concept, who-wins + non-targets, validated solves, risks, spec.
A converge node: a buildable specification for a dev team.
